elements.name: Description
texts: "There is a vast extent of bog in Templecarn in which fir and other timber are found..."

elements.name: Source
texts: Parish of Templecarn, in Institute of Irish Studies, and Royal Irish Academy, Parishes of County Donegal / Edited by Angélique Day and Patrick McWilliams. II 1835-6, Mid, West and South Donegal., Ordnance Survey Memoirs of Ireland; v.39, p. 158

elements.name: Publisher
texts: Institute of Irish Studies in association with The Royal Irish Academy, Belfast

elements.name: Rights
texts: Citation for the purposes of criticism

elements.name: Text
texts: "There is a vast extent of bog in Templecarn in which fir and other timber are found. Nothing unusual was heard of in connection with these bogs except what has been stated, that cultivated knolls rise out of them. There are very few existing traces of woodlands, if we except those deposited in bogs." (p. 158)
